claims.summary: The regulator include shell proves the visible viscosity mechanisms are active.
claims.disposition: Corrected: source inclusion and declarations do not establish runtime activation.

claims.summary: Viscosity and resonance diagnostics are available as read-only mechanical evidence.
claims.disposition: Verified current evidence types and tests without granting control authority.

claims.summary: A pressure tail can remain felt despite nominal controller stability.
claims.disposition: Preserved as unscored felt evidence; passing controller checks do not close it.

claims.summary: Pressure-tail and porosity context should be compared under the same deployment.
claims.disposition: Routed to natural exact-identity observation without inducing pressure.

claims.summary: PI gains or porosity should automatically respond to felt viscosity.
claims.disposition: Held for Tier 5 operator approval because it changes live regulation and improperly turns felt evidence into control input.
